schema.description: Workspace-level default settings for newly created Studios.

lifespanHours.description: Default lifespan for new Studio sessions in hours. Set to `0` for unlimited lifespan.

containerRepository.description: Custom container repository used for new Studios in the workspace. Can be `null`.

privateStudioByDefault.description: If `true`, new Studios in the workspace default to private visibility.

schema.title: DataStudioWorkspaceSettingsRequest
